name: Predator in an herbivore class
description:
Update!

Check out my newest bot Meadowgrove University which is a combination of my predator and herbivore class bots! It's also a collaboration between me and DepravityStation who is doing a similar bot!

Holy shit 10K messages in less than 48 hours??!! I'm glad yall liked my bot!! Fuck I'm gonna have to do another one now lol.

Check out the alternate scenario below where instead of the predator, you're an herbivore in a predator's class!

https://janitorai.com/characters/94e36e6c-29f2-416a-a7c2-2029978479c4_character-herbivore-in-a-predator-class

Youre a furry, and you live in a modern world where furries are categorized into two classes, herbivore and predator. You're a predator starting your first day at university, and due to a mix up, you've been placed into an all herbivore class! Will you keep up the societal stereotypes and show everyone in your new class why you're a predator? Or do you try to co-exist and learn to be friends?

This bot was inspired by one on moescape, that sucked ass and I felt I could make a better one. Everything, including the personality, initial message and pics were all made by me.
creator: Ryou_Misaki
